Name: MW3565-U-E2
Short description:
• 65” Ultra HD 4K display
  • 40-point multi-touch support
  • Android 13 operating system
  • 8GB RAM & 128GB storage
  • Wi-Fi 6 & Bluetooth 5.2
  • Anti-glare tempered glass
  • Multiple connectivity ports
  • Built-in stereo speakers
Description:
Overview

The UNV MW3565-U-E2 is a next-generation 65-inch 4K interactive display built to enhance collaboration, communication, and productivity in modern educational and professional environments. Designed for classrooms, conference rooms, training centers, and hybrid workspaces, it combines ultra-clear visuals, intelligent touch interaction, wireless collaboration, and powerful system performance into one seamless solution.

With a premium UHD display, advanced multi-touch technology, and smart wireless connectivity, the MW3565-U-E2 transforms meetings and presentations into engaging, highly interactive experiences.

Immersive 4K Interactive Experience

Featuring a 65-inch Ultra HD display with vivid color reproduction and wide viewing angles, the MW3565-U-E2 delivers sharp visuals for presentations, teaching materials, video conferencing, and collaborative discussions. Its anti-glare tempered glass improves visibility while reducing reflections, ensuring comfortable viewing even in brightly lit environments.

The display supports ultra-responsive multi-touch interaction, allowing multiple users to write, annotate, draw, and collaborate simultaneously with smooth and accurate touch performance.

Intelligent Collaboration & Wireless Sharing

The MW3565-U-E2 is designed to simplify teamwork and wireless collaboration. Users can instantly share screens from laptops, smartphones, and tablets, enabling faster idea sharing and more efficient meetings without complicated cable setups.

Built-in whiteboarding tools, annotation support, and real-time collaboration features make brainstorming sessions and classroom discussions more interactive and productive.

Powerful Performance for Modern Workspaces

Powered by an advanced octa-core processor with high-speed memory and storage, the display ensures smooth multitasking and responsive performance during demanding applications. Whether running presentations, educational software, cloud collaboration tools, or video conferencing platforms, the MW3565-U-E2 delivers stable and efficient operation.

The Android-based platform provides an intuitive user interface with quick access to applications, settings, and collaboration tools.

Optimized for Hybrid Meetings & Education

Equipped with extensive connectivity options including HDMI, USB Type-C, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and LAN connectivity, the display integrates effortlessly into modern meeting rooms and digital classrooms.

Its compatibility with conferencing platforms and external peripherals makes it ideal for:

  • Smart Classrooms
  • Corporate Meeting Rooms
  • Training & Seminar Halls
  • Hybrid Learning Environments
  • Conference & Collaboration Spaces
  • Presentation & Briefing Centers

Clear Audio & Seamless Communication

Integrated high-performance speakers provide clear and powerful audio for presentations, online meetings, and multimedia playback. Combined with its smooth touch response and wireless collaboration capabilities, the MW3565-U-E2 creates a fully connected communication experience.

Built for Productivity

From interactive teaching and team collaboration to digital presentations and remote communication, the UNV MW3565-U-E2 is engineered to improve workflow efficiency while delivering a modern, professional user experience. Its intelligent features, premium display quality, and powerful connectivity make it an ideal solution for organizations embracing smarter collaboration technologies.

Name: MW3575-U-E2
Short description:
• 75” Ultra HD 4K display
  • 40-point multi-touch support
  • Android 13 operating system
  • Wi-Fi 6 & Bluetooth 5.2
  • Anti-glare tempered glass
  • 178° ultra-wide viewing angle
  • Multiple HDMI & USB ports
  • Built-in stereo speaker system
Description:
Overview

The UNV MW3575-U-E2 is a premium 75-inch 4K smart interactive display engineered for large classrooms, conference rooms, training halls, and collaborative business environments. Combining ultra-clear UHD visuals, intelligent multi-touch interaction, powerful Android performance, and advanced wireless connectivity, it delivers an immersive and highly efficient collaboration experience for both education and enterprise applications.

Designed for modern hybrid workspaces and smart learning environments, the MW3575-U-E2 enables seamless presentations, real-time annotations, wireless sharing, and interactive communication on a large-format display.

Immersive 75-Inch 4K Display

Featuring a large 75-inch Ultra HD panel with 3840 × 2160 resolution, the MW3575-U-E2 delivers stunning image clarity, vivid colors, and exceptional viewing comfort. Its 178° wide viewing angle, anti-glare tempered glass, and 1.07 billion color support ensure excellent visibility and consistent image quality from every position in the room.

With a smooth 60Hz refresh rate and responsive display performance, the interactive display is ideal for presentations, digital whiteboarding, video playback, and collaborative discussions.

Intelligent Multi-Touch Collaboration

The MW3575-U-E2 supports up to 40-point multi-touch interaction, enabling multiple users to write, annotate, draw, and collaborate simultaneously with precision and responsiveness. Its infrared touch technology ensures accurate touch detection and smooth writing performance for both classrooms and meeting environments.

The advanced touch response system provides a natural writing experience while improving engagement during interactive lessons, brainstorming sessions, and presentations.

Powerful Android 13 Performance

Powered by an advanced octa-core processor with 8GB RAM and 128GB internal storage, the display delivers fast multitasking and stable performance for demanding applications. Running on Android 13.0, it offers a modern, intuitive interface with quick access to collaboration tools, whiteboarding features, conferencing platforms, and multimedia applications.

Whether used for teaching, presentations, or hybrid meetings, the MW3575-U-E2 provides smooth and responsive operation throughout the day.

Seamless Connectivity & Wireless Sharing

The display is equipped with extensive connectivity options including HDMI, DisplayPort, VGA, USB Type-C, USB 3.0, dual LAN ports, Wi-Fi 6, and Bluetooth 5.2. These interfaces allow easy integration with laptops, conferencing systems, cameras, storage devices, and wireless presentation tools.

Its wireless sharing capabilities simplify collaboration by enabling users to instantly present content from multiple devices without complicated cable connections.

Optimized for Modern Workspaces

The MW3575-U-E2 is ideal for a wide range of professional and educational environments, including:

  • Smart Classrooms
  • Corporate Meeting Rooms
  • Training & Seminar Halls
  • Hybrid Learning Spaces
  • Collaboration Centers
  • Conference & Presentation Rooms

Its large-format display and intelligent collaboration tools make it especially suitable for larger audiences and interactive group sessions.

Powerful Audio & Professional Design

Built-in high-performance stereo speakers provide clear and powerful sound for presentations, video conferencing, and multimedia playback. The sleek professional design, durable anti-glare glass, and robust build quality ensure reliable long-term performance in demanding environments.

Built for Productivity

From interactive teaching and remote collaboration to professional presentations and digital communication, the UNV MW3575-U-E2 is designed to improve workflow efficiency while delivering an engaging user experience. Its combination of premium visuals, intelligent touch technology, and advanced connectivity makes it a powerful solution for organizations adopting smarter collaboration technologies.
